mission: Prove the supervisor can pause for a Codex Desktop thread and resume after response.

steps.summary: Ask a Codex Desktop thread to produce an agent output artifact.
success_criteria: A Codex Desktop thread can execute the prompt.

steps.summary: Compile Python harness files after desktop thread response.
steps.command: C:\Users\yhj\.cache\codex-runtimes\codex-primary-runtime\dependencies\python\python.exe -m py_compile skills\agent-flight-recorder\scripts\trace_tools.py mcp\flight-recorder\server.py hooks\hook_event.py runner\supervisor.py runner\adapters\codex_adapter.py runner\adapters\desktop_thread_bridge.py
